lede: A look at August 16 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Madonna and Hongxi Emperor, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Vietnam War
events.desc: Vietnam War: A coup d'état replaces Dương Văn Minh with General Nguyễn Khánh as President of South Vietnam. A new constitution is established with aid from the U.S. Embassy.

events.title: Cyprus
events.desc: Cyprus gains its independence from the United Kingdom.

events.title: Direct Action Day
events.desc: Mass riots in Kolkata begin; more than 4,000 people would be killed in 72 hours.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: US Navy L-class blimp L-8 drifts in from the Pacific and eventually crashes in Daly City, California. The two-man crew cannot be found.

events.title: Ray Chapman
events.desc: Ray Chapman of the Cleveland Indians is hit on the head by a fastball thrown by Carl Mays of the New York Yankees. Next day, Chapman will become the second player to die from injuries sustained in a Major League Baseball game.

events.title: San Sebastian Church (Manila)
events.desc: The Basilica of San Sebastian, Manila, the first all-steel church in Asia, is officially inaugurated and blessed.

events.title: Richard Wagner
events.desc: Richard Wagner's Siegfried, the penultimate opera in his Ring cycle, is premiered at the Bayreuth Festspielhaus.

events.title: French Revolution
events.desc: French Revolution: A levée en masse is decreed by the National Convention.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: The Americans led by General John Stark rout British and Brunswick troops under Friedrich Baum at the Battle of Bennington in Walloomsac, New York.

events.title: Wang Mang
events.desc: Wang Mang consolidates his power in China and is declared marshal of state. Emperor Ai of Han, who died the previous day, had no heirs.

births.name: Madonna
births.line: American singer-songwriter, producer, actress, and director

births.name: Arvind Kejriwal
births.line: Indian civil servant and politician, 7th Chief Minister of Delhi

deaths.text: Idi Amin, Ugandan field marshal and politician, 3rd President of Uganda

observances.text: Christian feast day: Ana Petra Pérez Florido
Christian feast day: Stephen I of Hungary
Christian feast day: Translation of the Acheiropoietos icon from Edessa to Constantinople. (Eastern Orthodox Church)
